mapper.sql: id, user_id, focus_user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE mvp_user_focus SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND focus_user_id = #{focusUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mvp_user_focus WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND focus_user_id = #{focusUserId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mvp_user_focus WHERE focus_user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mvp_user_focus WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
